label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who ends up with which present after all these swaps. So, we have five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each starts with a different colored present. Let me list out the initial assignments first. Initially: - Alice has pink - Bob has brown - Claire has green - Dave has red - Eve has purple Now, there are a series of swaps. Let me go through each step one by one and track whose present is where. First swap: Claire and Bob swap. So after this swap, Claire will have Bob's present (brown) and Bob will have Claire's original (green). Let me note that down. After first swap (Claire & Bob): - Alice: pink - Bob: green - Claire: brown - Dave: red - Eve: purple Second swap: Claire and Dave swap. So Claire gives her brown present to Dave, and takes Dave's red present. Now: After second swap (Claire & Dave): - Alice: pink - Bob: green - Claire: red - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Third swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob has green, Alice has pink. After swapping: After third swap (Bob & Alice): - Alice: green - Bob: pink - Claire: red - Dave: brown - Eve: purple Fourth swap: Alice and Eve swap. Alice has green, Eve has purple. After swapping: After fourth swap (Alice & Eve): - Alice: purple - Bob:
